heading: Today
text: Variable clouds and sun, breezy, and warmer.  A few localized morning showers.  A rising chance of showers or a local, gusty thunderstorm through NY, spreading east from Rt. 4 north mid to late afternoon, isolated far south.  Highs in the 70s, some upper 60s near and north of the Quebec border.  Winds southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Showers becoming more numerous through NY, and Rt. 4 north, scattered south, perhaps an evening thunderstorm.  Lows in the low to mid 40s north, in the 50s south.  Winds south 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph through midnight, then diminishing to less than 10 mph.

heading: Wednesday
text: Occasional rain and showers from the Green Mountains west, and north of Rt. 2, spreading southeast in the afternoon.  Cooler.  Highs in the upper 40s to mid 50s north, in the 60s south.  Winds light from the south, becoming north 5 to 10 mph from the Adirondacks, Rt. 4, and White Mountains north.
